title: helichrysum hamulosum
intro: Helichrysum hamulosum is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, known for its aromatic and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in volatile oils, particularly the sesquiterpene, which is responsible for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Helichrysum hamulosum has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum hamulosum can be found in the form of essential oil, tinctures, and infusions, making it accessible for topical and internal use.
